ops.title: v0.11.0 (2026-07-19) ships tailnet: URLs + embed validation; 0.10.x→0.11 upgrade needs one manual old-daemon stop per machine

ops.body:
Shipped 2026-07-19 across three releases — synckit v0.21.0 (`SelfDNSName`), cc-interact v0.12.0 (`AddHTTPListener`, atomic `http.json`, scoped SPA fallback), cc-present v0.11.0: `start`/`push` print `tailnet:` MagicDNS URLs, tailnet legs bind dynamically on a 30s reconcile, `GET /api/health` is the only non-vacuous probe, and the daemon refuses to start on a missing/inconsistent web embed (`internal/web/dist` is fully untracked but for `.gitkeep`, which a vite `closeBundle` hook restores after `emptyOutDir`).

Gotchas that will bite again:

- **0.10.x → 0.11.0 upgrade wedge (bug c89e5cd in cc-present notes):** the daemonkit wire migration means the new daemon cannot health-check or evict an old incumbent (`wire: frame exceeds maximum`) — one manual stop of the old daemon per machine (old binary's `stop`, or `pkill -f 'cc-present.* daemon'`), then `start`. Done on yBook-Pro and yasyf-home 2026-07-19; any other 0.10.x machine still needs it. Note `cc-present status` does NOT lazy-spawn the daemon — after a kill, spawn via any artifact command or `nohup cc-present daemon &`.
- `tailscale serve`/Funnel remain banned by contract — a proxied board 401s on subresources (foreign Origin on loopback) even when the embed is fine.
- The `tailnet:` URL is token-free only from synckit-mesh machines; phones use the `pair` QR flow.
- A bare HTTP 200 never proves a cc-present board works — the SPA fallback used to 200 everything; probe `/api/health` for `{"version":…}`.
- synckit has a flaky rpc test (`TestPostSendFailureIsNotReplayedAndNextCallReconnects`, bug 9ecf56f in synckit notes) — a red synckit CI on an unrelated diff is likely that; rerun before diagnosing.

Related: [[cc-present-dev-daemon-versioning]], [[cc-present-release-flow]], [[cc-present-push-dance]].
